runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 390m. Last start failed to finish the race over 450m at this track on April 9. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning off back straight and lost ground.
Checked and fell on first turn.

runners.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (25.31) over 450m at Shepparton. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 450m at Ballarat in a handy (25.52), beating Super Batman. Can measure up again with the right run.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Horsham to win by 2 lengths in 27.18, beating Ulenta Bale. Last start finished 6th over 520m at Geelong beaten 11 lengths (30.87) behind Paw Waverly in a Special conditions H on April 10. Well placed and among the chances here.
